Disney and Pixar’s Toy Story 5—Behind the Scenes as Toy meets Tech!

Hear from director and screenwriter Andrew Stanton, co-director and screenwriter Kenna Harris, producer Lindsey Collins, and more about the making of the new film.

The post Disney and Pixar’s <em>Toy Story 5</em>—Behind the Scenes as Toy meets Tech! appeared first on D23.

text:
Marvel Comics Celebrate 50 Years of The Muppet Show with New Comic Book

This September, a new one-shot answers the question, “What if...?,” as The Muppets collide with the Marvel Universe for the first time in stories by Chip Zdarsky, Pete Woods, and more!

The post Marvel Comics Celebrate 50 Years of <em>The Muppet Show</em> with New Comic Book appeared first on D23.
